Package org.areslib.subsystems.drive

Class SwerveDriveSubsystem

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.command.SubsystemBase
org.areslib.subsystems.drive.SwerveDriveSubsystem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subsystem, AresDrivetrain
public class SwerveDriveSubsystem extends SubsystemBase implements AresDrivetrain
SwerveDriveSubsystem standard implementation.

Acts as the structural controller for handling physics logic across four modules.

Hardened for zero-allocation in high-frequency loops.

  • Method Details

    • periodic

      public void periodic()
      Description copied from interface: Subsystem
      This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler. Useful for updating subsystem-specific state that you don't want to defer to a Command.
      Specified by:
      periodic in interface Subsystem
